name: Grilled Lemon-And-Gin Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, whisk together the lemon juice, gin, oregano (fresh or dried), salt, pepper, and sugar until the mixture is well combined.
2. Gradually add the vegetable oil to the mixture, whisking continuously until the marinade is emulsified.
3. Place the chicken breasts in the dish, ensuring they are well coated with the marinade. Cover and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
4. Preheat the grill to medium heat. Place an oiled rack about 6 inches over the glowing coals.
5. Grill the marinated chicken for 7 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
6. Remove from heat and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
